title: UW-Madison Google Workspace  - Exporting Multiple Files from Google Drive
body: Log in to UW-Madison Google Workspace: UW-Madison Google Workspace - Log in From Google Drive, check the box next to each file you want to export by hovering over the blue icon and then selecting the checkbox. From the More menu, select Download... A Preparing Download pop-up will appear in the lower right-hand corner of your browser screen while your download is processing. To continue with the download, no action is required. To cancel the download, click on the x button. See Also UW-Madison Google Workspace - Preserve your data UW-Madison Google Workspace - Copy your Google Site to a different account
